title: User Portfolio and Preferences - Baseline
outcome: Portfolio positions, allocations, and user preferences logged for optimization baseline. Preferences: high risk tolerance, 25 years old, $5M net worth. Objective: lower beta/correlation, maximize risk-adjusted return and alpha.

title: Draft Optimized Portfolio & Rationale
outcome: Portfolio significantly de-risked and diversified: high-beta/clustered tech, REIT, and low-performing emerging exposures were removed; additions offer lower beta, stronger risk-adjusted returns, and better cross-sector balance. Core growth/tech/AI alpha (PLTR, APP, NVDA) moderately overweight. Low-beta, high-profit ETF/utility/consumer/health/energy names anchor downside. Key gold/silver/EM allocations maintained. See working portfolio for allocations and tickers.
